## Description

Brief description of the change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (describe migration below)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Related issues

Fixes #(issue)  
Closes #(issue)  
Related #(issue)

- 
- 

## Testing

- [ ] Manual: `verify-stack.sh` and/or monitor smoke-tested (describe host)
- [ ] `pytest` (if applicable): `cd monitor && .venv/bin/pytest`
- [ ] Shell scripts: `shellcheck` clean (if you ran it)

## Documentation

- [ ] `README.md` / `monitor/README.md` / `docs/` updated if behavior or env vars changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes

## Accessibility (dashboard / HTML)

- [ ] Not applicable (no UI change)
- [ ] Headings / contrast / non-color cues reviewed for dashboard changes

## Security

- [ ] No secrets, wallet seeds, or real `.env` committed
- [ ] Security implications described if this touches RPC, HTTP APIs, or SMTP

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Style matches surrounding code
- [ ] No unrelated drive-by refactors

## Breaking changes

If any, document what operators must change.
